payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Do not commit the new relationship as durable memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input refers to the same named person but asserts a directly conflicting family relationship with the user. Identity is likely the same entity, but the relationship cannot be safely updated without clarification.

details: Compared existing memory and new input.
Detected mutually exclusive close-family relationship claims for the same named person.
Chose not to write new durable memory.

repair_options: Ask whether these statements refer to the same Sara.
Ask which relationship is correct now.
If there are two different people named Sara, create separate entities with distinguishing details.
